config.user_description: Build a second autonomous runner like agent-task-runner.yml, but sourced from real GitHub issues on Projects board #7. Select issues by label/status, decide doable-or-not, run /plan-and-do headless with pre-authorized checkpoints, set ticket In progress. On a real question, pause: add 'Input needed' label + explanatory comment; resume on a later run (fresh re-run with full issue+comments) after a human replies and removes the label.

decisions.resume: re-run /plan-and-do fresh each run with full issue + all comments
decisions.output_scope: implement + PR + merge to main (full autonomy)
